corresponding PLAN_ID_14) to the CONTRACT_ID_15 (and PLAN_ID_15). 

You need to know both the contract number and plan benefit package identification number (variable 
called PLAN_ID_YY) to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries for the 
particular year (YY). 

This variable corresponds with the CONTRACT_NAME variable in the plan base file for the year, which 
is the contract name that corresponds with this number.
